title: rubus silvae-norticae
intro: Rubus silvae-norticae, also known as the Woodland Bramble, is a species of thorny shrub native to certain regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus silvae-norticae include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
